title: Calibration Tab: Selecting a calibration
description:
Calibration Tab: Selecting a calibration

Calibration Tab: Selecting a Calibration

Notice the drop down list shown at the top of the Calibration tab.  Clicking on the down arrow displays a list of all the calibrations for this project. (Some projects have only 1 calibration and others have many depending upon the vision application.)  You can then click on any one of the calibrations to select which one you want to work on.
